description*.en: The "Equlilbrium Constant", also known as the thermodynamic equilibrium constant, is an expression that gives us a ratio of the products and reactants of a reaction at equilibrium with respect to a specific unit.

title: EquilibriumConstant
description: The "Equlilbrium Constant", also known as the thermodynamic equilibrium constant, is an expression that gives us a ratio of the products and reactants of a reaction at equilibrium with respect to a specific unit.
